description: Exclusively launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — No International Law (LAWLESS) reflects the reality that global power often outweighs the so-called International Law. Inspired by the idea that strength shapes authority and survival favors the strong, LAWLESS delivers instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, and AI contract capability, making it a globally unstoppable, memorable digital asset.
name: No International Law
